text.headline: Gengchen Mai - Academic Chronicle
text.text: A timeline of education, research, academic positions, and contributions to GeoAI and spatial data science.

text.headline: B.S. in Geographic Information System
text.text: Graduated from Wuhan University with a Bachelor's degree in Geographic Information System from the School of Resource and Environmental Sciences. Received three consecutive Chinese National Scholarships (2011-2014) and named Outstanding Undergraduate Student of Wuhan University (11 out of 8000+ students).

text.headline: Graduate Student Researcher at UC Santa Barbara
text.text: Graduate Student Researcher at STKO Lab & UCSB Spatial Center, Department of Geography, College of Letter & Science, UC Santa Barbara, under Prof. Krzysztof Janowicz.

text.headline: Research at National Center for Ecological Analysis & Synthesis
text.text: Graduate Student Researcher at National Center for Ecological Analysis & Synthesis (NCEAS), UC Santa Barbara, under Prof. Krzysztof Janowicz.

text.headline: M.A. in Geography from UC Santa Barbara
text.text: Completed Master's degree in Cartography and Geographic Information Science at UC Santa Barbara. Master thesis: 'ADCN: An Anisotropic Density-Based Clustering Algorithm for Discovering Spatial Point Patterns with Noise' under Prof. Krzysztof Janowicz.

text.headline: Software Development Intern at Esri
text.text: Worked on Elasticsearch and Machine Learning/NLP projects including Named Entity Recognition at Environmental Systems Research Institute in Redlands, CA.

text.headline: ML & NLP Research Intern at SayMosaic
text.text: Research internship at SayMosaic Inc. in Palo Alto, CA, working on Deep Reinforcement Learning, Sequence Models, Q&A, IR, and NLP under Dr. Ni Lao.

text.headline: Cartographic Engineer Intern at Apple Maps
text.text: Machine Learning internship at Apple Inc. in Cupertino, CA, working on Graph Neural Networks and Map Generalization for Apple Maps.

text.headline: AI Resident at Google X (Summer)
text.text: First AI Resident position at Google X Core AI Team in Mountain View, CA, working on Time Series Forecasting and Causal Discovery/Inference under Dr. Hongxu Ma.

text.headline: AI Resident at Google X (Fall)
text.text: Second AI Resident position at Google X Core AI Team in Mountain View, CA, continuing work on advanced AI research under Dr. Hongxu Ma.

text.headline: Ph.D. in Geography from UC Santa Barbara
text.text: Earned Ph.D. in Cartography and Geographic Information Science with emphasis in Cognitive Science from UCSB Geography. Dissertation: 'Geographic Question Answering with Spatially-Explicit Machine Learning Models'. Received Jack and Laura Dangermond Graduate Fellowship, AAG 2021 Dissertation Research Grant, AAG 2022 William L. Garrison Award for Best Dissertation in Computational Geography, and AAG 2023 J. Warren Nystrom Award.

text.headline: Postdoctoral Scholar at Stanford AI Lab
text.text: Postdoctoral researcher at Stanford Artificial Intelligence Laboratory and Stanford Sustainability and Artificial Intelligence Lab, Department of Computer Science, Stanford School of Engineering, under Prof. Stefano Ermon.

text.headline: Assistant Professor at University of Georgia
text.text: Tenure-Track Assistant Professor at the Department of Geography, Franklin College of Arts and Sciences, University of Georgia. Director of Spatially Explicit Artificial Intelligence (SEAI) Lab at UGA. Affiliated Professor with Department of Computer Science, School of Computing, and UGA Institute for Artificial Intelligence. Member of UGA Environmental AI Faculty Cluster and Institute for Integrative Precision Agriculture (IIPA).

text.headline: AAG Dissertation Research Grant
text.text: Awarded AAG 2021 Dissertation Research Grant for doctoral research on Geographic Question Answering with Spatially-Explicit Machine Learning Models.

text.headline: AAG William L. Garrison Award
text.text: Awarded the 2022 AAG William L. Garrison Award for Best Dissertation in Computational Geography (awarded once every other year).

text.headline: AAG J. Warren Nystrom Award
text.text: Awarded the 2023 AAG J. Warren Nystrom Award for research on general-purpose representation learning of polygonal geometries.

text.headline: Assistant Professor at UT Austin
text.text: Joined the Department of Geography and the Environment, College of Liberal Arts, at the University of Texas at Austin as Tenure-Track Assistant Professor. Founded and directs the Spatially Explicit Artificial Intelligence (SEAI) Lab at UT Austin. Maintains Adjunct Professor position at Department of Geography, UGA, and Faculty Fellow at UGA Institute for Artificial Intelligence.

text.headline: Visiting Faculty Researcher at Google Research
text.text: Appointed as Visiting Faculty Researcher at Google Research in Mountain View, CA, working on GeoAI and foundation models.

text.headline: NSF Research Grant - $300,000
text.text: Awarded $300,000 National Science Foundation research grant for measuring and mitigating geographic bias in AI models and foundation models.
